proposals.motive: Resolve contradictory license information to provide a single consistent license.
proposals.diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -104,4 +104,4 @@ build_sea.mjs     Empaquetado Node SEA
 
 ## Licencia
 
-ISC. Ver `package.json`.
+MIT. Ver `package.json`.

proposals.motive: Improve error handling mechanisms in API interactions to prevent unhandled exceptions.
Review and manage the exposure of sensitive information in raw JSON from YouTube.
proposals.apply_error: error: src/utils/jsonHandler.ts: No such file or directory

proposals.motive: Clarify and update documentation, especially regarding environment setup.
proposals.diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -43,7 +43,7 @@ git clone <repo-url> shinobibot && cd shinobibot
 # 2. Instalar deps
 npm install
 
-# 3. Configurar .env
+# 3. Configurar el entorno (.env)
 cp .env.example .env
 # edita y rellena al menos: OPENAI_API_KEY (o OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
 # y, si usas el cloud, OPENGRAVITY_URL + SHINOBI_API_KEY.

proposals.motive: Audit and update dependencies, specifically addressing known vulnerabilities in dot-prop.
